item.title: OnAir 3.0.19
item.description:
What's New in OnAir 3.0.19

  • Fixed microphone identified as "Browser" instead of Teams during Teams app meetings.
  • Fixed external device change detection race condition causing false alerts.
  • Stale meeting watchdog: forces device OFF if Teams WebSocket goes silent for 2 minutes.
  • Microphone polling fallback for USB audio devices (Yealink, Brave Browser).
  • Web meetings (Meet, Zoom Web) no longer end prematurely after 10 seconds.
  • Shortcut confirmation window: dark mode, Focus Mode offset, improved timing.
  • Check for Updates now responds on first click.
